query:
ALTER TABLE consent_forms 
ADD COLUMN title VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN description TEXT,
ADD COLUMN formFields TEXT,
ADD COLUMN participantName VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN parentName VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN parentEmail VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN parentPhone VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN signatureData TEXT,
ADD COLUMN formResponses TEXT,
ADD COLUMN createdBy INT,
ADD COLUMN expiryDate TIMESTAMP;
